name: Barking Complaint
description: Complaint about a barking or noisy dog
checks: Is the address of the barking dog provided?
How long has the issue been occurring?
Has the complainant spoken to the dog owner?

metadata_fields.duration: How long the issue has been occurring

response_templates.formal_complaint: Thank you for your barking complaint regarding {complaint_address}. A Council Ranger will investigate within 14-21 days.
response_templates.mediation_suggested: We recommend speaking with your neighbour first. If the issue persists, please lodge a formal complaint.
